content:
# Session 21 (review of iter-021)

## Metadata
- Sorry-bearing decls (cold-build verified firsthand): **FBC 4 / SNAP 5**. Sorry tokens: FBC 4, SNAP 6.
- **Net frontier sorry elimination: 0.** BUT **+2 new sorry-free decls** (1 per file) ‚Äî net-positive content.
- Both files cold-build GREEN firsthand (exit 0): SNAP 2441 jobs, FBC 8318 jobs. 0 kernel timeouts, 0 new axioms. blueprint-doctor: 0 findings. sync_leanok iter-21 sha b065ada (+1 \leanok on SNAP unitor bridge).
- Targets: SNAP `tensorObjAssoc_hK_lhs_native` (blocked) + net-progress fallback; FBC glue `..._ring_square_mate_glue` (partial) + seeds.
- No regression; iter-018 mis-cert trap avoided (both cold-built; LSP `lean_goal` unreliable on these targets).

## SNAP ‚Äî net-progress unitor bridge CLOSED; associator wall reconfirmed irreducible (‚âà10th churn iter)
- **CLOSED (NEW, sorry-free, cold-GREEN, axiom-clean = {propext,Classical.choice,Quot.sound}):**
  `tensorObjUnitIso_eq_localizedLeftUnitor` (blueprint `lem:tensorObjUnitor_eq_localized`). The leandag-READY
  independent unitor bridge the PROGRESS net-progress fallback recommended. NOT gated on the blocked associator.
  - Engine: `apply Iso.ext`; `‚Üê Iso.eq_inv_comp` isolate localized unitor; `cancel_epi (ùüô ‚óÅ c_G)`;
    `erw [leftUnitor_naturality]` (bridges `unitModule X` vs `ùüô_`); `rw [leftUnitor_hom_app]` (fires only at
    `(L').obj _` ‚Äî reduce general `G` to `L'G‚ô≠` first); collapse `c_G`/`c_G‚Åª¬π` via `erw
    [tensorHom_comp_tensorHom_assoc]` + `Iso.hom_inv_id` + `tensorHom_id`; `rfl` closes light residual.
  - Reusable: the `unitModule X` ‚Üî `ùüô_` token-divergence + the `modulesLocalizedMonoidal`‚Üî`LocalizedMonoidal`
    comp-instance divergence BOTH block `rw`/`cancel_epi`/`Category.assoc`; **`erw` bridges both** and the final
    object/assoc residual closes by plain `rfl` (light goal ‚Äî no deep Œº). `MonoidalCategory.braiding_leftUnitor`
    is REAL (key for the not-yet-attempted right-unitor bridge).
- **`tensorObjAssoc_hK_lhs_native` (L2314) ‚Äî BLOCKED, structural wall reconfirmed at max precision.** Most-surgical
  remaining route cold-build DEAD: an ISOLATED local `change` of JUST the single `c_{A‚äóB} ‚ñ∑ L'C‚ô≠` whisker to the
  `modulesLocalizedMonoidal X` synonym instance (no Œº syntactically inside) **times out at `isDefEq` (200000 hb)
  all by itself**. Reconciling the two `whiskerRight` INSTANCES is the irreducible bomb, INDEPENDENT of any heavy
  tail (`toMonoidalCategory`'s `whiskerRight` field is the localization lift ‚Üí comparing it to the synonym whnf's
  the localized Œº). All prior iter-018‚Üí020 routes already cold-dead. **The standing pre-committed trigger (pc019)
  remains: the ONLY resolution is the REFACTOR PIVOT (glue Option A), a refactor-agent task ‚Äî NOT a prover round.**
  Dual-instance DELETION stays REFUTED (load-bearing, 51-site cascade).

## FBC ‚Äî glue partial; algebraic component bridge KEPT; geometric `.app (tilde M)` bridge kernel-dead
- **KEPT (NEW, sorry-free, kernel-safe, axiom-clean):** `chartBaseChangeModuleReassoc_eq_natApp` (~L1770) ‚Äî
  states `chartBaseChangeModuleReassoc œà œÜ œÅ M = (chartBaseChangeModuleReassocNat œà œÜ œÅ).app M`, the algebraic-leg
  M-component bridge. Carriers are `ModuleCat.extendScalars` (NO sheafification) so the `congr 1` proof-irrelevance
  close is kernel-light. **Coverage debt: NO blueprint entry yet** (in `dag-query unmatched`) ‚Üí recs.
- **Glue `pullback_spec_tilde_iso_ring_square_mate_glue` (L1900) ‚Äî PARTIAL (typed sorry).** SHARPENED obstacle
  (kernel-verified, supersedes iter-020 framing): the GEOMETRIC `.app (tilde M)` Nat-bridge is kernel-unsafe by ANY
  tactic ‚Äî residual morphism types are `tilde M`-evaluated ‚Üí the kernel must whnf the heavy `pullback ‚àò tilde`
  sheafification; the LSP shows a single proof-irrelevance residual (`goals_after=[]`) but cold `lake build`
  `(kernel) deterministic timeout`s regardless of close tactic. Bombs **even with `M` a free variable** ‚Üí the
  generic-N escape is REFUTED. Close tactic is irrelevant. Geometric bridge attempt REMOVED (replaced with NOTE).
  - **Forward route (documented in-file, not attempted): PURE TERM-MODE / nat-level** ‚Äî `natTrans_ext_of_unit` +
    the 2 closed legs + `gammaPushforwardNatIso_comp`, single final `.app M` `exact`, NEVER an intermediate
    `.app (tilde M)` rewrite (a direct `exact <closed-lemma> œà œÜ œÅ M` over a `.obj (tilde M)` type IS kernel-light;
    only `simp`/`congr`/`rw`/`rfl` defeq-checks at that type bomb). The kept algebraic bridge is the algebraic half
    in place. Large multi-step.
- **Seeds `affineBaseChange_pushforward_iso` (L2373) / `flatBaseChange_pushforward_isIso` (L2395) ‚Äî BLOCKED**, both
  gated on the transitive-sorry crux + Mathlib-absent infra (restriction-compat / ƒåech). NOT touched.

## Subagent findings (reports in `.archon/logs/iter-021/`; triage in recommendations.md)
- **lvbc-snap021** (0 must-fix / 3 minor): unitor bridge faithful + axiom-clean; `native` NOTE honest. Minor: blueprint
  NOTE stale "Lean L2251"‚ÜíL2314 (**FIXED** by me) + a Lean-side docstring drift (claims "image form") ‚Äî Lean-owned.
- **lvbc-fbc021** (0 must-fix / 2 major / 3 minor): blueprint honest (no false `\leanok`, kernel-bomb disclosed).
  Majors ‚Üí recs: (1) `chartBaseChangeModuleReassoc_eq_natApp` no `\lean{}` block (coverage debt); (2) 6 dangling
  `ring_square_glue_*` `\lean{}` targets absent from all source. Crux is transitively sorry-backed (disclosed; minor
  that no explicit `% NOTE`).
- **lean-auditor iter021** (10 must-fix / 4 major / 4 minor): 10 must-fix = tracked frontier sorries (DOWNGRADED per
  iter-014‚Üí020 precedent ‚Äî project work, not defects). 4 majors are FBC-mate-apparatus cleanup ‚Üí MEDIUM lane for the
  deferred mate-excision refactor iter: (a) misplaced `set_option maxHeartbeats 4000000 in` @L2009 scopes to a
  section docstring not the theorem (will time out when the sorry is filled); (b) dangling `@~1273/1304/1144/1999`
  recipe refs to **non-existent lemmas** (`base_change_mate_fstar_reindex_legs_unitExpand`, `‚Ä¶_gammaDistribute`,
  `base_change_mate_extendScalars_inner_value_counit`) ‚Äî RECURRING (matches iter-020 auditor CRITICAL), misleads next
  prover; (c) triple-redundant `set_option` L2044-2047; (d) 2 transitive-sorry decls (`base_change_mate_section_identity`,
  `pushforward_base_change_mate_cancelBaseChange`) ‚Äî honestly documented but axiom-unclean.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`, proof of `lem:tensorObjAssoc_hK_lhs`: corrected stale `% NOTE` line ref
  `Lean L2251` ‚Üí `Lean L2314`; appended a terse iter-021 `% NOTE` (isolated single-whisker `change` cold-dead;
  unitor bridge closed independently).
- No `\leanok` overrides (sync_leanok correctly added `\leanok` to the new unitor bridge; verified).
- No `\mathlibok` added (no new pure Mathlib re-export this iter).

## Notes (LOW)
- SNAP Lean docstring at `tensorObjAssoc_hK_lhs_native` (L2144-2150) self-contradicts ("image form" vs folded
  statement) ‚Äî Lean-owned doc drift, prover/planner cleanup.
- SNAP cold-build `show`-tactic linter warning at L3254 (cosmetic).
